reasoning_chain: The narrow residential street with parked cars on both sides and utility poles with overhead wires is typical of suburban Japanese neighborhoods.
The architecture features modern Japanese-style houses with flat roofs, concrete walls, and minimal landscaping, common in urban Japan.
The presence of a white kei car (small Japanese vehicle) and the style of the mailbox and door handles are consistent with Japanese residential areas.
